product_overview: Caleb Dashboard is a frontend for a verifiable autonomous trading agent that surfaces a live trade feed, full session audit trails with tamper-evident verification, on-chain attestations, per-wallet strategy configuration, and portfolio analytics. Users connect their Initia wallet to save strategies and attest verified sessions on-chain.
core_goals: See a live, continuously updating feed of agent trading sessions with verdict, confidence, and timestamps.
Open a session and inspect a full 5-step audit trail (policy → market → decision → check → execution) including reasoning and hashes.
Verify session integrity by re-hashing step payloads and comparing them to on-chain hashes.
Optionally attest verified sessions on-chain from a connected Initia wallet and view attestations from other users.
Configure and save per-wallet trading strategy parameters that the agent will use.
Monitor portfolio-level analytics including cumulative P&L, portfolio value, verdict breakdown, and confidence distribution.
Connect an Initia wallet to see live INIT balance and enable attestation and per-wallet settings.

features.name: Trade Feed
features.description: Live-updating feed of recent agent sessions showing verdict badges, confidence scores, timestamps, agent status, and portfolio stats; feed state is cached for faster revisits.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View list of trading sessions with verdict, confidence, and timestamp for each session -> See agent online/offline status indicator -> See stats bar with session counts and portfolio summary -> Select a session from the feed to open its detail view
Navigate to / -> Observe skeleton loading state while feed loads -> See feed populate from cache then refresh with live updates

features.name: Session Detail and Verification
features.description: Inspect a session's complete 5-step audit timeline with reasoning, confidence scores and per-step hashes; re-compute and compare hashes to on-chain data to detect tampering.
user_flows: From the trade feed select a session -> View the 5-step audit timeline (POLICY → MARKET → DECISION → CHECK → EXECUTION) with a hash for each step -> Expand a step to read signal reasoning and confidence score -> Expand raw session JSON to inspect full payload

From the trade feed select a session -> View the 5-step audit timeline -> Initiate verification of on-chain hashes for the session -> See per-step verification result badges indicating pass or fail -> Return to the trade feed

features.name: On-chain Attestation
features.description: After verifying a session, connected wallet users may attest on-chain to record independent verification; attestations and attester list are visible on the session.
user_flows: From the trade feed select a session -> Complete on-chain verification of the session -> Connect wallet if not already connected -> Initiate on-chain attestation for the verified session -> Confirm the attest transaction in the wallet -> See attestation transaction hash and a "You attested this session" indication -> View list of attestations with attester addresses and timestamps

features.name: Strategy Configuration
features.description: Per-wallet strategy form where users connect their wallet and configure algorithm, risk parameters, allowed tokens, and thresholds; settings are saved per wallet address.
user_flows: Navigate to /strategy -> If not connected see a prompt to connect wallet -> Connect wallet -> Toggle agent active/paused -> Select strategy algorithm (momentum or mean-revert) -> Set max spend per trade (USD) -> Adjust min signal strength slider (0 to 1) -> Toggle allowed tokens (INIT, ETH, USDC) -> Set max position size (USD) and max drawdown percentage -> Save strategy -> See saved confirmation
Navigate to /strategy without connecting wallet -> See connect wallet prompt and disabled strategy inputs

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Portfolio-level analytics including stat cards, liveline charts for cumulative P&L and portfolio value, verdict breakdown, and confidence distribution for recent sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to /analytics -> View stat cards showing total P&L, portfolio value, win rate, and trade count -> Scrub over the cumulative P&L liveline chart to inspect historical values -> Scrub over the portfolio value liveline chart -> View verdict breakdown pie chart and confidence distribution bar chart

features.name: Wallet Connection and Balance
features.description: Global Initia wallet connection exposing the connected address and live INIT balance on the Initia testnet; required for saving strategies and attesting.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Initiate wallet connection -> Complete wallet connection -> See wallet address displayed in the navigation area -> See live INIT balance card on the home page

routes.description: Trade feed home page showing all agent sessions, portfolio stats, agent status, and user balance
Session detail page with full 5-step audit trail, on-chain verify, and attest functionality
Per-wallet strategy configuration form (requires wallet connection)
Analytics dashboard with cumulative P&L, portfolio value, verdict breakdown pie chart, and confidence distribution
Proxy API route to verify a session's on-chain hashes (avoids mixed-content)
Proxy API route to fetch attestations for a session (avoids mixed-content)

features.name: Trade Feed
features.description: Live-updating feed of all agent trading sessions with verdict badges (BUY/SELL/SKIP), confidence scores, and timestamps. Polls every 10 seconds. Shows skeleton loading state. Caches to localStorage for instant revisits.
user_interactions: View list of trading sessions with verdict, confidence, and timestamp
See agent online/offline status indicator
See stats bar with session counts
Click a session card to navigate to session detail page

features.name: Session Detail and Verification
features.description: Full 5-step audit timeline (POLICY, MARKET, DECISION, CHECK, EXECUTION) with on-chain transaction hashes. One-click verify re-hashes all step payloads and compares to on-chain hashes. Shows signal reasoning, confidence score, and strategy used.
user_interactions: View 5-step audit cycle with hash for each step
Click "Verify on-chain" button to verify all hashes match
See verification result badges (pass/fail per step)
Copy transaction hashes to clipboard
Expand raw session JSON data
Click back button to return to feed

features.name: On-chain Attestation
features.description: After verifying a session, connected wallet users can attest on-chain by signing a transaction that calls attest(bytes32) on the DecisionLog smart contract. Shows attestation count and list of attester addresses.
user_interactions: Connect wallet (if not connected) via "Connect wallet to attest" button
Click "Attest on-chain" button after successful verification
See attestation transaction hash after confirming
See "You attested this session" badge
View list of all independent attestations with addresses and timestamps

features.name: Strategy Configuration
features.description: Per-wallet trading strategy configuration. Users connect their Initia wallet, then configure strategy algorithm, max spend, confidence threshold, allowed tokens, max position size, and max drawdown. Settings are saved to the agent API by wallet address.
user_interactions: See "connect wallet" prompt if not connected
Click connect wallet button
Toggle agent active/paused switch
Select strategy algorithm (momentum or mean-revert)
Set max spend per trade (USD input)
Adjust min signal strength slider (0 to 1)
Toggle allowed tokens (INIT, ETH, USDC)
Set max position size (USD input)
Set max drawdown percentage
Click "Save Strategy" button
See "Saved" confirmation

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Portfolio analytics with stat cards (total P&L, portfolio value, win rate, trade count), cumulative P&L liveline chart, portfolio value liveline chart, verdict breakdown pie chart, and confidence distribution bar chart.
user_interactions: View stat cards showing total P&L, portfolio value, win rate, and trade count
Scrub over cumulative P&L chart to see values at different points
Scrub over portfolio value chart
View verdict breakdown pie chart (BUY/SELL/SKIP)
View confidence distribution bar chart

features.name: Wallet Connection and Balance
features.description: Global wallet connection via InterwovenKit. Shows live INIT balance on Initia testnet when connected. Connect button in navigation bar.
user_interactions: Click Connect button in top navigation
See wallet address displayed after connecting
See live INIT balance card on home page

known_limitations.issue: API proxy routes (verify, attestations) forward to an HTTP VPS, which may be unavailable
known_limitations.impact: Verification and attestation features fail if the VPS at 64.227.139.172 is down

known_limitations.issue: Strategy page requires wallet connection, no guest/demo mode
known_limitations.impact: Users without an Initia wallet cannot view or interact with strategy configuration

known_limitations.issue: Attestation requires a specific Initia chain (caleb-chain) which is a custom testnet
known_limitations.impact: Users need to be on the correct custom chain to attest, which may not be in their wallet by default
